conanferreira123/Major.oneLineSummary: A Local-First Agentic AI Workspace with autonomous planning, local sovereignty, and deep integration
conanferreira123/Major.technicalSummary: The project follows a decoupling of high-reasoning intelligence from local data management and productivity execution, utilizing a multi-agent architecture with specialized agents for different tasks, coordinated through a central orchestrator
bullets: DECENTRALIZED ARCHITECTURE: Utilizes a decoupled architecture to separate high-reasoning intelligence from local data management and productivity execution
MULTI-AGENT SYSTEM: Employs a multi-agent architecture with specialized agents for different tasks, coordinated through a central orchestrator
AUTONOMOUS PLANNING: Enables autonomous planning and execution of complex tasks using local LLMs and a local Vector Database
LOCAL SOVEREIGNTY: Ensures 100% privacy and offline capability by utilizing local models and data storage
DEEP INTEGRATION: Connects local data with agents that can read, write, and act on that data
HIGH-END UX: Provides a futuristic terminal-like interface that transparently shows the AI's thought process
SECURE AUTHENTICATION: Implements secure authentication and authorization using Python-Jose and Passlib
SCALABLE INFRASTRUCTURE: Utilizes Docker-based Milvus server for scalable vector database management
REAL-TIME EVENT STREAMING: Enables real-time event streaming using WebSockets for efficient communication between agents and the frontend
